The all-rounder is yet to better his debut season with the ball, where he picked up 17 wickets for Kings XI Punjab, now Punjab Kings.

‘Dhurandhar: The Revenge’ box office collection: Film crosses Rs 800 crore mark
description: Ranveer Singh's 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' is a massive Bollywood blockbuster, crossing Rs 500 crore net domestically and Rs 800 crore worldwide. The spy thriller, a sequel to the 2025 hit, continues its successful box office run despite a slight dip on its first Monday. The film's gripping narrative and strong performances are driving its phenomenal success.

title: 'Repeat after me': Jaipur driver held for forcing foreign tourist to abuse in Hindi
description: An auto-rickshaw driver in Jaipur was apprehended by tourist police for tricking a foreign woman into uttering offensive Hindi phrases. The incident, captured on video and widely shared, led to the driver's arrest on charges of misconduct and tourist harassment. Authorities emphasized the deceptive and inappropriate nature of the act.

Odisha man's head shaved, fined Rs 90,000 over inter-tribe marriage
description: A 22-year-old tribal man in Odisha's Koraput district was allegedly forced to pay a Rs 90,000 fine, host a community feast, and have his head publicly shaven after marrying a woman from another tribe. The couple had eloped due to opposition from their respective communities. The traditional settlement ceremony formalized their union after these conditions were met.

title: 'Muslims not allowed': Delhi man claims ride denied due to religion
description: A Delhi commuter was allegedly denied a cab ride by a Rapido driver who explicitly stated Muslims were not allowed. The incident, captured in an audio clip shared online, has sparked outrage and prompted Rapido to suspend the driver. The company has reiterated its zero-tolerance policy against discrimination.

description: A brawl erupted at Kolhapur's Jyotiba temple, leading to 17 priests and as many devotees being booked by police. Viral videos showed the clash, causing fear among worshippers. The dispute reportedly began after devotees threw a broken coconut with gulaal at a priest, escalating into a physical altercation with conflicting accounts from both sides.

Who is Nabeel Gabol? The alleged Pakistani politician behind Dhurandhar's Jameel Jamali
description: Dhurandhar 2's massive success has sparked a stir, with Pakistani politician Nabeel Gabol finding himself in the spotlight.  Initially enjoying the resemblance to his character Jameel Jamali, Gabol is now reportedly in a panic as the film portrays Jamali as an Indian spy.  Netizens are having a field day, trolling the politician online.

title: Horrific murder caught on cam in Bengaluru: Man bludgeoned to death with jack rod
description: A 27-year-old man was brutally murdered near Bhovi Colony in Bengaluru after an altercation over money. The accused, an auto driver and his friend, were arrested within six hours. The victim had allegedly been harassing the accused for funds to support his drinking habits, leading to the fatal confrontation.

title: MLB rumors: Braves eye $340M Padres superstar amid outfield woes
description: Atlanta Braves are reportedly eyeing San Diego Padres star Fernando Tatis Jr. ahead of the 2026 season.  A potential trade package includes outfielder Mike Yastrzemski and promising prospects Didier Fuentes, Owen Murphy, and Diego Tornes. This move aims to bolster Atlanta's outfield and lineup, while San Diego could gain valuable young talent and salary relief.
